Event: The Prince of Darkness Castle Siege
Event Date: 04/04/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A213


Other locations the gear can be found
Adventurer Challenge - Castle Siege
Blazing Barrel Artifact

Triggers: 4 sec

Seal the Rift
The artifact owner sunders the armor of 3 random enemies. When the armor is torn, those enemies takes pure damage equal to 30% of their max health and have their physical and magic armor reduced by 40% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 2 times. These enemies also takes pure damage equal to 35% of their max health for 4 sec.

For the duration of the battle, when an enemy gains a decay or has its armor torn or sundered, the artifact owner deals 165000 pure damage to that unit. The ability triggers up to once per 1 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
